title: GatewayProfile
description: OHM MCP gateway tenant profile (one per API key). Validated by ohm-gateway --validate-config (OHM-912).

api_key.description: API key that identifies this profile.

ohm_url.description: Base URL of the ohmd instance this profile forwards to (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:8710).

ohm_token.description: Bearer token used to authenticate to ohmd. May be an agent or customer token.

agent_id.description: Agent identity this profile claims when forwarding to ohmd.

tenant_id.description: Tenant identifier. Required for multi-tenant deployments; ignored otherwise.

allowed_tools.description: Tools this profile is permitted to call. ['*'] allows all.

read_only.description: If true, all write tools are hidden regardless of allowed_tools.

high_blast_radius.description: Tools that require explicit approval before execution.

audit_path.description: Optional path to an audit log file for this profile.

sidecars.description: Sidecar composition manifest (#899, draft — not yet enforced).

tool_visibility.description: Per-session tool visibility rules (#900, draft — not yet enforced).

elicitation.description: Per-tool elicitation overrides (#901, draft — not yet enforced).
